tldr: These tools solve different problems — Melos orchestrates Dart/Flutter packages, Hermit pins CLI tool versions — so this is rarely a true substitution and usually only fits if the project moved off Dart/Flutter.
why_switch: Need polyglot CLI tool pinning across the team and CI
Want hermetic per-project tool installs without polluting PATH
Drop Dart-specific dependency in favor of a generic tool manager
Simpler scope: just tool versions, no package orchestration
what_to_export: List of CLI tools your workflow currently relies on
Dart/Flutter SDK versions used by Melos commands
Scripts defined in melos.yaml you want to preserve
CI commands that wrap melos run / melos bootstrap
External tools your packages depend on at build time
export_method: No automated tool. Manually inventory melos.yaml scripts and identify which entries depend on CLI tools (vs which depend on Melos's package orchestration). Hermit can replace the tool-pinning aspect only. If you still need cross-package scripts, plan a separate solution (Make, just, npm-style runners). Verify current Hermit features against the official documentation.
import_method: Initialize Hermit in the repo per the official installation guide. Use hermit install for each CLI tool you identified. For Dart/Flutter SDK pinning, check whether the current Hermit catalog includes them — otherwise pair Hermit with fvm or asdf. Re-implement melos.yaml scripts in your chosen task runner. Update CI to source Hermit's activation script before invoking commands. Confirm exact commands and catalog entries via the official Hermit docs.

concept_mapping.note: Move task definitions to a generic runner
If keeping Dart, run dart pub get manually or via script

concept_mapping.target: hermit install or external SDK manager
concept_mapping.note: Verify Hermit catalog; otherwise use fvm/asdf

gotchas: You lose package orchestration entirely — versioning, changelogs, pub publishing
If you still ship Dart packages, this swap will likely hurt; reconsider
Hermit catalog may not include every Dart/Flutter version you need
Pre-commit and lint configs must be re-created independently
CI workflows need a full rewrite of the activation step
Validate every command and tool name against current Hermit documentation

email.subject: Proposal: replace Melos with Hermit (only if we're moving off Flutter)
email.body:
Hi team,

Melos and Hermit aren't true substitutes — Melos manages Dart/Flutter packages, Hermit pins CLI tools. I want to flag this swap only as a fit if our project is leaving the Dart/Flutter ecosystem.

If so, plan: inventory CLI tools, install via Hermit, port melos scripts to a generic task runner, drop Melos. Estimated 1-2 days. If we're staying on Flutter, we should keep Melos and just add Hermit alongside for non-Dart tools.

Thoughts?

Thanks
